prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等热门专业社会热度持续偏高，但海南大学相关专业录取位次较高；河北2026年普通高考考生 总数约609800人，较2025年（物理类363040+历史类243714=606754）略有增加，竞争基数小幅扩大；省控线方面，物理类本科批从2021年412分升至2025年459分，呈逐年上升趋势；海南大学位于海南省海口市，对河北考生属于跨省远距离报考，地域偏好因素相对较弱；该校在河北省招生计划占比较小，属于省外招生。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续后移趋势、2026年物理类缩招14人（-8.4%）的竞争加剧效应、软科排名持续上升带来的吸引力增强、以及河北考生总数小幅增加等因素，考虑历史后移惯性及考生规模扩大，预测2026年物理类最低位次约48980名，区间48480–49480名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were approximately 33361 → 41073 → 42431 → 49791 → 51275, showing a continuous backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 17914 places in the past 4 years. The baseline ranking for 2025 is about 51275. The enrollment plan for this university in Hebei Province for Physics Category: 97 in 2021, 96 in 2022, 115 in 2023, 128 in 2024, 166 in 2025, and 152 in 2026. Compared to 2025, 2026 sees a reduction of 14 students (-8.4%), a relatively large reduction, which theoretically should intensify competition and move rankings forward.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Hainan University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university. Its ranking in the Soft Science China University Rankings has been steadily rising: 144th in 2021 → 130th in 2022 → 118th in 2023 → 104th in 2024 → 93rd in 2025 → 87th in 2026, indicating an enhancement in comprehensive strength and recognition. In 2023, there was a negative incident where a teacher refused to cooperate with nucleic acid testing and had their teaching qualification revoked, leading to a negative evaluation. In 2024, the reputation turned neutral/mixed, with rising admission scores sparking controversy over major selection. Its Douyin popularity ranks 32nd overall (relatively hot), with a comprehensive popularity of about 1.365 million, indicating above-average attention on short video platforms, which has a certain positive effect on application enthusiasm. No obvious record of enrollment gaps was observed. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Hainan University did not have any disciplines rated A- or above, with advantageous disciplines mainly concentrated in tropical agriculture, marine science, and other characteristic fields, placing its overall disciplinary competitiveness at a medium level.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Popular majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to have high social popularity, but the admission rankings for related majors at Hainan University are relatively high. The total number of regular college entrance examination candidates in Hebei for 2026 is approximately 609,800, a slight increase from 2025 (363,040 in Physics Category + 243,714 in History Category = 606,754), leading to a small expansion of the competition base. Regarding provincial control lines, the Physics Category undergraduate batch has risen from 412 in 2021 to 459 in 2025, showing an upward trend year by year. Hainan University is located in Haikou City, Hainan Province, which is a long-distance cross-province application for Hebei candidates, making regional preference factors relatively weak. The university's enrollment plan in Hebei Province accounts for a small proportion, making it an out-of-province enrollment.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend of historical rankings, the intensified competition effect due to a reduction of 14 students (-8.4%) in Physics Category for 2026, the enhanced attractiveness from the rising Soft Science ranking, and the slight increase in the total number of Hebei candidates, taking into account the historical backward inertia and the expansion of the candidate pool, it is predicted that the minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 will be approximately 48980, with a range of 48480–49480.

If your ranking is close to the lower limit of the range (above 49480), it is recommended to prioritize Tier 2 majors such as Pharmacy and Marine Science, and use Tier 3 majors as a safe backup.
